decisions.note: Source says water-level data recorded on form or handheld program; S12–S15 are intermediate recording steps, not final data recording. C10 should attach to S20 (final measurement section) as the postcondition for all data being recorded.
Source says disinfection 'will reduce the possibility of contamination'; prescriptive language 'should' matches the stated purpose/benefit, not absolute requirement.
Source says 'Maintain the tape in good working condition by periodically checking…'; the postcondition is the state of maintenance, not separate from S24.
Source describes lowering tape until weight touches water, not a separate 'lower into well' step. S7 and S8 should be consolidated or S7 removed as a distinct action.
